_comment: Paxos Transit station (source-chain) addresses, deployed + verified by Paxos 2026-06-29 (EXSC-547). offerAsset is ERC20-only; submitOrder carries msg.value for the LayerZero messaging fee. submitOrder is a PUBLIC capability (verified on-chain), so the Diamond can call it; routes must be approved by Paxos and quotes signed by their quoteSigner.
